case_title: EVANS, BRIAN VS PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VOLCAN CONSTRUCTION & MAINTENEANCE,INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY $2,515.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-14-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-10-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
